reason: No active canonical frontier_research item existed; this additive update records the next completed non-duplicative research slice without overwriting shared queue state.

proposed_item.action: Translate current sink-loss behavior into a privacy-preserving transition evaluator for silent-but-logically-playing audio states.

progress.finding: A selected sink can become unavailable without media pausing or automatic fallback, so logical playback can continue while audio is not rendered. Detect devicechange, re-enumerate permitted outputs, and retain only transition booleans and error classes.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files.

proposed_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should connect this evaluator to devicechange and permitted output re-enumeration, then pair the classification with render-position evidence and a physical iPhone audibility observation. Never retain raw device identifiers or labels.
